title: hieracium sparsum subsp. amblylepis
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. amblylepis, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
